---
title: "Presentation Style Test"
brand: ../_brand.yml
tbl-cap-location: bottom
lightbox: auto
format:
  revealjs:
    pdf: true
    fig-align: center
    cap-location: bottom
    slide-number: true
    toc: false
    controls: true
    progress: true
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    margin: 0.05
    hash: true
    center: false
    chalkboard: true
    footer: "BIOL 275 Biostatistics | Spring 2026"
    theme:
      - default
      - ../tlm-theme.scss
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://use.typekit.net/tag1lvz.css">
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Minimal layout visualization (color fills only)
   Reveal-only, no layout-affecting properties */

/* Entire slide area */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug {
  position: relative;
  background-color: rgba(220, 50, 47, 0.06); /* slide area */
}

/* Title area */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug h2 {
  background-color: rgba(38, 139, 210, 0.15);
}

/* Columns container */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug .columns {
  background-color: rgba(133, 153, 0, 0.10);
}

/* Individual columns */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug .column {
  background-color: rgba(181, 137, 0, 0.14);
}

/* Inner content block (visual “content area”) */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug .col-content {
  background-color: rgba(108, 113, 196, 0.18);
}

/* Lists inside columns */
.reveal .slides section.layout-debug ul {
  background-color: rgba(211, 54, 130, 0.12);
}
</style>
```

## Content Slide

-   Bullet 1\
-   Bullet 2

## Dense Text Slide (Stress Test)

-   Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
-   Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
-   Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.
-   Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.
-   Curabitur pretium tincidunt lacus. Nulla gravida orci a odio.
-   Nullam varius, turpis et commodo pharetra, est eros bibendum elit, nec luctus magna felis sollicitudin mauris.

## Two-Column Text Layout

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Left Column**

-   Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
-   Consectetur adipiscing elit
-   Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt
-   Ut labore et dolore magna aliqua
-   Ut enim ad minim veniam
-   Quis nostrud exercitation
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Right Column**

-   Duis aute irure dolor
-   In reprehenderit in voluptate
-   Velit esse cillum dolore
-   Eu fugiat nulla pariatur
-   Excepteur sint occaecat
-   Cupidatat non proident
:::
:::::

## Text and Image

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Level 3 Heading

-   Same goal as histograms: reveal shape, center, spread, skew
-   No bins; based on a continuous density estimate
-   Emphasize overall patterns rather than exact counts
-   Well suited for comparing multiple groups on the same axis
-   Shape depends strongly on bandwidth (smoothing level)
-   Defaults can mislead — adjust bandwidth intentionally
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](https://fastly.picsum.photos/id/17/2500/1667.jpg?hmac=HD-JrnNUZjFiP2UZQvWcKrgLoC_pc_ouUSWv8kHsJJY){fig-alt="Placeholder test image used to evaluate layout and caption sizing."}

*Figure: Placeholder image used to test Reveal.js image scaling and caption typography.*
:::
:::::

## Slide with a long title: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit ded do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua

-   Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
-   Consectetur adipiscing elit
-   Sed do eiusmod tempor
-   Incididunt ut labore
-   Et dolore magna aliqua

## Layout Checks

-   Code

``` r
summary(cars)
```

## Slide Layout Diagnostic {.layout-debug}

::::::: columns
:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: col-content
**Left column content**

-   Bullet list block
-   List padding/indent
-   Line spacing
-   Wrapping behavior
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: col-content
**Right column content**

-   More bullets
-   More bullets
-   More bullets
-   More bullets
:::
::::
:::::::

-   Bullet list block
-   List padding/indent
-   Line spacing
-   Wrapping behavior
